production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM skeptic: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-034-1A", **{'tp': 1, 'fp': 1, 'fn': 0, 'accuracy_only': False}}
meets_contract = record["accuracy_only"] is False
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REJECT_ACCURACY_ONLY"
print("S34-T1-A", status)

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Desbalance fuerte: priorizar precision/recall o PR-AUC de la cola.
Resamplear todo antes de CV introduce leakage y métricas infladas.
Calibrador se ajusta en set de calibración fuera de muestra.
Score en banda low–high: abstener según política.
